title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 387.433 - Inapplicability, when
text:
387.433.  Inapplicability, when. — The provisions of sections 387.414 and 387.432 shall not apply to entities described in Section 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code, state or local government entities, or federally recognized Indian tribes.
(L. 2017 H.B. 130)
